expectation_sources.name: Projection in RealSense SDK 2.0
expectation_sources.expectation: Each stream has its own pixel and 3D coordinate system, and extrinsics are rigid transforms in meters between stream coordinate frames.

expectation_sources.name: Intel RealSense D400 Series Datasheet / D455 product page
expectation_sources.expectation: D455 is a D400-family stereo device with a nominal 95 mm baseline and USB3-advertised 848x480 and 640x480 operating points.

expectation_sources.name: Fast-FoundationStereo README
expectation_sources.expectation: Stereo inputs should be rectified, undistorted, and use the true left and right images.

recommendation.primary_statement: ir_pair is stable on all 3 cameras, but rgb_ir_pair is not yet stable as a same-take mode.
recommendation.comparison_statement: Do not promise same-take depth-vs-FFS comparison yet; depth_ir_pair / rgbd_ir_pair remain unstable or unsupported.

refresh_notes: 2026-04-11: refreshed the three-camera rgbd_ir_pair 848x480@30 emitter=on case with a targeted 30.0s revalidation run.
Temporary targeted probe sample/log artifacts were cleaned after the run.
